title: D3: Migrate Drizzle .all()/.run() → portable patterns in storage/
boundary: storage/ adapter + pipeline Drizzle method migration
consumer_purpose: Eliminate SQLite-only Drizzle methods .all() by adding portable .execute() to DrizzleLikeClient interface
claim_atoms: duckClient and SQLite adapter implement it
content:
## Scope
6 files surveyed — only 2 have Drizzle calls:
- `storage/adapter.ts`: DrizzleLikeClient interface + implementations
- `storage/pipeline.ts`: 2 x `db.all(sql)` calls

## Changes

### 1. adapter.ts — Add `execute` to DrizzleLikeClient
Add `execute: <T = any>(query: any) => { rows: T[] }` to the interface.
This mirrors Drizzle PG's `db.execute()` return shape.

### 2. adapter.ts — Implement `execute` in DuckDB adapter
In `makeDuckDBAdapter`, the `duckClient` gets:
```ts
execute: <T>(query: any) => {
  const sql = String(query)
  checkDuckDBSQLFirewall(sql)
  return client.all<T>(sql).then(rows => ({ rows }))
}
```

### 3. adapter.ts — Implement `execute` in SQLite adapter
In `makeSQLiteAdapter`, the wrapper client gets `execute`:
```ts
execute: <T = any>(query: any) => {
  const result = pg.query?.(String(query))
  return Promise.resolve({ rows: (result?.rows as T[]) ?? [] })
}
```

### 4. adapter.ts — Update error message
Line 284: `"DuckDB does not support Drizzle query builder — use db.all(sql) or db.get(sql) directly"` → `"use db.execute(sql) or db.get(sql) directly"`

### 5. pipeline.ts — Migrate `db.all()` to `db.execute()`
Two call sites. Change from:
```ts
db.all("SELECT ...")
```
to:
```ts
db.execute("SELECT ...").then(r => r.rows)
```

Note: `pipeline.ts` uses `db: any` inside the callback, so no type issues.

### Files not modified
- storage/storage.ts — git.run only, not Drizzle
- lsp/lsp.ts — Promise.all only, not Drizzle
- lsp/server.ts — Promise.all / Process.run, not Drizzle
- lsp/client.ts — Promise.all, not Drizzle

### Verification
1. `bun typecheck` in packages/opencode — must pass
2. Verify no `.all()` calls remain in pipeline.ts
3. Verify interface has `execute` method
